data.body: Starting self-waltz-ace (da53): extract per-action batch handlers from applier._apply_batch into NEW apply_handlers.py; keep applier as sequencer (drift-recheck loop -> dispatch -> record -> manifest tail). Baseline: apply+mutate tests 352 passed. Seam mapped: handlers wrap batch_dispatch create_one/update_one/delete_one; audit guard + _load_acli/_load_concurrency stay resident (test-patched). Remaining epic children after this: unfed-liner-arson (outbound_differ split), hush-quail-holm (reconcile_once decompose), foamy-gem-skip (E2E config tests).
